title: Non-software example ruleset
description:
Ship an example ruleset for a non-software hierarchy to demonstrate that the engine and its new lifecycle features carry no software assumptions.

## Background

jit is generic: projects may configure hierarchies without epics or milestones (research programs, knowledge work). All current examples assume a software epic/task shape.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] An example ruleset under docs/examples/ models a non-software methodology (e.g. research goals with experiments and evidence sections) using its own configured types, sections, and label namespaces
- [ ] The example uses state predicates and transition enforcement where appropriate
- [ ] No rule in the example references epic or milestone types
- [ ] The examples index and validation-engine concepts doc present it alongside the existing examples
